clearCache.title: Clear cache
clearCache.message: This will erase data stored locally by the app, and you will be logged out of the application.
clearCache.messageLoggedOut: This will erase data stored locally by the app (cache, preferences, temporary files).

offline.offlineSubtitle: Could not connect. Check your Wi-Fi or network cable and try again.
offline.devSubtitle: The Vite server is not responding at localhost:3000. Run npm run dev in the client project.

saveSession.title: Save this session on this device?
saveSession.subtitle: Once saved, you can sign in again without typing your password.
saveSession.device: Only use this option on trusted devices.
saveSession.savedSubtitle: Next time, sign in with one click.

accounts.emptySubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.
accounts.removeAllDesc: This will remove all saved accounts from this device.
accounts.loginError: Could not sign in. Please check your credentials.
accounts.chooseSubtitle: Click on an account to sign in.
accounts.confirmRemoveDesc: The account "{{name}}" will be removed from this device.

picker.title: Choose what to share
picker.subtitle: The site will have access to your screen content
picker.macPermission: On macOS, go to Preferences → Privacy → Screen Recording.
